phase: PHASE 01 - MVP REFRAME, REPO AUDIT, AND SALES DEMO CONTRACT

auditSummary.tenantSchema: 0010 adds tenants, tenant domains, identity providers, tenant users, auth identities, and OAuth states.
auditSummary.announcementState: Announcements are active in schema, routes, workspace loading/cards, seed data, generated route inventory, and tests.
auditSummary.seedState: Local and remote demo seeders create 250 fake students in a single-site style program/cohort model with fake staff, mentors, evidence, reviews, mentor meetings, presentation slots, exports, and announcements.

decisions: site_admin backend role displays as Administration.
Existing admin remains platform-equivalent during transition.
misc_admin remains legacy/narrow and must not silently become site admin.
Announcements are removed from the MVP product surface.
Figma alignment is MVP credibility work.
No domain/OAuth/Cloudflare hostname changes in this sequence.
Demo data must be fake .test only.
nonGoals: no real user import unless credential-delivery policy is approved
no replacement for Remind/Canvas/IC/Google Classroom announcements
no full tenant-owned Drive migration unless a later phase targets it
no full org-wide analytics before site admin demo is solid
no destructive schema cleanup in early phases

validation.npm run test: passed: 251 passing tests, 4 expected local HTTP skips
validation.npm run check: passed: aggregate checks and 251 passing tests with 4 expected local HTTP skips
validation.git diff --check: passed with existing CRLF normalization warning for docs/progress/run-log.md

blockers: Site/school schema and route layer are missing and should be added additively in Phase 2.
Announcements remain active in current code/docs/tests until a later removal pass.
Generated route inventory still reflects current announcement routes and should not be manually edited without route changes.
